code:
sequenceDiagram
    title Docker Security Implementation Sequence
    
    participant Client as Client
    participant Apache as Apache Container
    participant Crowdsec as Crowdsec Agent
    participant Firewall as Firewall Bouncer
    participant PHP as PHP-FPM Container
    participant DB as MariaDB Container
    participant DinD as Docker-in-Docker
    
    Note over Client, DinD: Network Security
    
    Client->>Apache: HTTP/HTTPS Request
    
    %% Crowdsec Security Flow
    Apache->>Crowdsec: Log request for analysis
    Crowdsec->>Crowdsec: Parse and analyze logs
    
    alt Malicious Request Detected
        Crowdsec->>Firewall: Add client IP to blocklist
        Firewall->>Client: Block future requests
        Apache->>Client: Return 403 Forbidden
    else Request Allowed
        Apache->>PHP: Forward request via Unix socket
    end
    
    %% Container Isolation
    Note over Apache, DB: Container Security Isolation
    
    %% User permission security
    Apache->>Apache: Run as non-root user (Logistics_StockLevel)
    PHP->>PHP: Run as non-root user (Logistics_FleetManagement)
    DB->>DB: Run with limited privileges
    
    %% Volume permissions
    Note over Apache, DB: Volume Security
    Apache->>Apache: Access socket with specific permissions
    PHP->>PHP: Access socket with specific permissions
    
    %% HTTPS communication
    Client->>Apache: HTTPS Request
    Apache->>Apache: SSL Termination with server.crt/key
    Apache->>PHP: Internal communication over Unix socket
    
    %% Security Headers
    PHP->>Apache: Response with generated content
    Apache->>Apache: Add security headers
    Apache->>Client: Response with security headers
    
    %% DinD Security
    Note over DinD: Docker-in-Docker Security
    DinD->>DinD: Run with privileged mode
    DinD->>DinD: SSH access with authentication

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流系统画一个完整的Docker安全架构时序图。核心场景是：外部Client请求进来，经过Apache容器，再到PHP-FPM和MariaDB，同时整个链路要有Crowdsec做入侵检测，Firewall Bouncer做IP封禁。另外还有个Docker-in-Docker的特殊节点要处理。
明白了。Crowdsec和Firewall Bouncer的协作关系是：Apache把日志给Crowdsec分析，发现恶意请求后Crowdsec通知Firewall去封禁IP，对吗？还有那个Docker-in-Docker，它是跑在特权模式下的？
对，Crowdsec检测流程要画一个alt分支：恶意请求走封禁路径返回403，正常请求才转发到PHP-FPM。Docker-in-Docker确实需要privileged模式，但还要加上SSH认证的安全措施。另外所有容器都要以非root用户运行，Apache用Logistics_StockLevel，PHP-FPM用Logistics_FleetManagement。
好的，我先画出主链路：Client→Apache→PHP-FPM→MariaDB，加上Crowdsec和Firewall的旁路检测。然后标注容器隔离和非root用户运行。HTTPS这块需要体现SSL终止在Apache，内部用Unix socket通信。
等等，Unix socket的权限要细化一下——Apache和PHP-FPM访问socket都需要特定权限标注。还有响应链路别忘了：PHP生成内容返回给Apache，Apache要加上安全响应头再发给Client。
已调整。现在加上了Volume Security区域，标注socket权限；响应链路也补全了，PHP→Apache→Client，中间有Add security headers的步骤。DinD节点我单独放在底部，标注privileged模式和SSH认证。
MariaDB的运行状态描述需要改一下——不是简单的非root用户，应该是"Run with limited privileges"，权限限制比用户身份更准确。还有Network Security的Note要覆盖Client到DinD的整个顶部区域。
收到，已修正MariaDB的描述为limited privileges，Network Security的Note范围也调整好了。整个图现在包含：顶部网络安全层、中间Crowdsec检测分支、容器隔离层、卷安全层，以及底部DinD安全区。还有需要补充的吗？
没问题了。最后确认一下标题用"Docker Security Implementation Sequence"，所有参与者标签要清晰：Client、Apache Container、Crowdsec Agent、Firewall Bouncer、PHP-FPM Container、MariaDB Container、Docker-in-Docker。可以定稿了。
